response.overview: Spejdernes Lejr meets one of the world's most popular digital universes, as three of Denmark's most well-known Minecraft YouTubers take to the Main Stage alongside Lakserytteren. The two brothers Emil and Mikkel Trier and Nat, known from Nat og David, all four beloved by children and young people across the country.  With hundreds of thousands of followers, they are among the most-watched Minecraft creators in Denmark — and now they're meeting their scout fans live for the very first time at Spejdernes Lejr. Together with Lakserytteren, you can look forward to a Wednesday event at the camp unlike anything seen before.  We can't yet reveal exactly what's in store. But if you have scouts between the ages of 8 and 14, chances are they know exactly who's coming — and that they'll be absolutely thrilled when you tell them. This is one of those events they'll be talking about not just when they get home, but for many years to come.  Stay tuned — more details on the way.
response.tagline: An epic stage show for all scouts!
response.title: Spejdercraft
